name: Crispy Potato Slices with Herb & Garlic Goat Cheese
recipeIngredient: 1/4 cup finely chopped fresh herbs such as parsley,
salt and freshly ground black pepper
pistachios, finely chopped red bell pepper
recipeInstructions:
Preheat the oven to 400°F.
Cut the potatoes crosswise into 1/4-inch thick slices and arrange in a single layer on one or more oiled baking sheets as needed. Drizzle the potato slices with olive oil. Roast them in the oven, turning once halfway through for about 30 minutes or until golden brown and crisp. If roasting unevenly, rotate the baking sheet occasionally. Transfer the potatoes to paper towels to drain and season with salt.
In a food processor, combine the goat cheese, milk, herbs, garlic, and salt and pepper to taste. Puree until smooth.
Top each potato slice with a dollop of the cheese mixture using a teaspoon or piped from a pastry bag. Garnish each hors d'oeuvre with pink peppercorns, pistachios, red bell pepper, or herb sprigs.
Yield: about 40 hors d'oeuvres
